chapter_title.ar: باب آخَرُ فِي إِبْطَالِ الْعَوْلِ وَ أَنَّ السِّهَامَ لَا تَزِيدُ عَلَى سِتَّةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 6 – Another (chapter) regarding the invalidation of the deficiency/excess and that the (legislated) shares (of inheritances) do not exceed upon six

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/124)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/124)
text: السِّهَامَ لَا تَكُونُ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ سِتَّةِ أَسْهُمٍ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Abu Ayoub Al Khaza, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> that the (legislated) shares (of inheritances) cannot happen to be more than six shares’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from abu Ayyub al-Khazzaz from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has narrated the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The ordained shares are not more than six.’”
